subject: [PATCH man-pages v1 6/6] ioctl_userfaultfd.2: Reference UFFDIO_RWPROTECT and UFFDIO_SET_MODE

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch updates the documentation for the ioctl_userfaultfd system call to include two new ioctls, UFFDIO_RWPROTECT and UFFDIO_SET_MODE, which were introduced in Linux 7.2. The patch adds these ioctls to the list of supported operations on a userfaultfd file descriptor.
